place: Chalong, Mueang Phuket District, Phuket 83130, Thailand
title: Larimar Vista — Lakeside Villas in Chalong, Phuket
blurb: A gated collection of just eleven lakeside villas in the heart of Chalong — Phuket's most functional address, where the best international schools, hospitals and lifestyle malls all sit inside a fifteen-minute radius. Two- and three-storey homes of 425 to 680 m², each with a private pool, dual kitchens and covered three-car parking, backed by a wellness clubhouse and round-the-clock concierge. Off-plan, pre-sale from ฿24.5M with a pay-50%-and-move-in plan.
detail:
Larimar Vista is a gated enclave of only eleven contemporary villas arranged around a private lake in Chalong, on the southern side of Phuket. The thinking behind it is straightforward: luxury measured in time. Almost everything a family needs sits within a fifteen-minute drive — roughly five minutes to BCIS (British Curriculum International School), ten to HeadStart International School, and ten to the Robinson Lifestyle mall and the My Front Yard community hub — so daily life runs on short, easy journeys instead of long ones.

The villas come in two- and three-storey configurations across three layouts, from 425 to 680 m² of build area, with four to five-plus bedrooms and five to seven bathrooms. Each is designed for the way larger households actually live: a private swimming pool, dual kitchens — a show kitchen for entertaining and a working kitchen behind it — a customizable flex room that can become a cinema, gym or extra suite, and covered parking for three cars. Interiors are finished in warm timber and natural stone, with floor-to-ceiling glass framing the water and the green hills beyond.

Residents share a wellness-focused clubhouse with a gym, sauna and massage rooms, while a 24-hour medical coordinator and concierge team handle everything from appointments to deliveries — managed, low-friction living usually reserved for a resort. Security and property management run around the clock.

Pre-sale pricing starts at ฿24,500,000 for a four-bedroom villa, with fully furnished packages available from ฿27M. Buyers can pay in stages tied to construction milestones, or take a pay-50%-and-move-in option with in-house financing of up to five years at 3–7% interest. Ten of the eleven villas remain.

features.l: Pay 50% & move in · up to 5-yr terms
